info.title: Captain API
info.description: Captain Scrappin API for scraper orchestration, market averages, history, and operational status.

get.summary: Latest aggregated prices for all products
Get current market average for a product (latest snapshot per vendor)
Get historical average prices for charting
Get latest vendor prices for a product

post.description: Triggers run:scrapers command. By default this forces immediate dispatch unless force=false is passed.

get.summary: Get queue and scraper execution status

put.description: Updates database-backed scrape frequency in minutes.

CaptainTokenHeader.description: Primary token header used by Captain middleware.
CaptainTokenHeader.name: X-CAPTAIN-TOKEN

BearerToken.description: Fallback bearer token format: Authorization: Bearer {token}
